headline: Columbia Threadneedle Investments Announces Retirement of Global Chief Investment Officer
summary: BOSTON & LONDON, May 20, 2026--Columbia Threadneedle Investments, the global asset management group of Ameriprise Financial (NYSE: AMP), today announced that William Davies, global chief investment officer, has decided to retire after 33 years of distinguished service to the firm and its clients. Mr. Davies’ retirement will be effective on June 30, 2026.

Mr. Davies’ retirement will be effective on June 30, 2026.

headline: Ameriprise Financial Recognized by Fortune as one of "America’s Most Innovative Companies" in 2026
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, May 20, 2026--Ameriprise Financial has once again been named to Fortune’s 2026 list of "America’s Most Innovative".
